Bus Timings

Abu Dhabi X60 Bus Timings from Abu Dhabi Bus Station to Liwa Mezaira’a Bus Station

November 10, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Abu Dhabi’s public transportation system offers a reliable and affordable way to navigate the city and its surroundings. Among its many routes, the X60 bus stands out for its journey from Abu Dhabi Bus Station to Liwa Mezaira’a Bus Station, connecting key destinations along the way. This guide provides an overview of the X60 route, detailing operational timings, major stops, and useful travel tips to enhance your journey.

Operational Details

The X60 bus operates throughout the day, ensuring frequent departures for both residents and visitors. Below is the schedule for Bus X60, with departures from both Abu Dhabi Bus Station and Mezaira’a Bus Station:

From Abu Dhabi Bus Station From Mezaira’a Bus Station
07:30 06:00
10:00 08:30
12:30 11:00
15:00 13:30
17:30 16:00
20:00 18:30

Bus X60 Timetable

For the complete schedule, visit the official AD Mobility website or follow this link for X60 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing: Passengers can conveniently pay their fare using the Hafilat Card, which is Abu Dhabi’s cashless payment system. The fare for journeys within a single zone is AED 2, with an additional charge of AED 0.05 per kilometer for any extra distance. Hafilat cards can be topped up easily at various kiosks throughout the city, providing a smooth and hassle-free travel experience.

Route Overview

The X60 bus route connects a variety of essential stops, catering to the needs of both commuters and tourists. Here’s a breakdown of key stops along the way:

  1. Abu Dhabi Bus Station (Start): The primary transportation hub in the city.

  2. Musaffah — Mohamed Bin Zayed City Bus Station: A critical interchange for local transit.

  3. Madinat Zayed Bus Station: Serves as a gateway to the western region and nearby attractions.

  4. Mezaira’a Bus Station: The endpoint, providing access to the Liwa area.

This well-planned route is designed to meet the practical needs of residents while also offering visitors an opportunity to explore significant areas around Abu Dhabi.

For other convenient options, check out the A40 bus that runs from Al Shahama Bus Station to Baniyas West Bus Station, or take the M2, which loops back to Mazyad Mall—both are excellent choices for navigating the area!

Accessibility and Services

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

Bus X60 is designed with accessibility in mind, ensuring a comfortable experience for all passengers. Key features include:

  • Wheelchair Ramps for easy boarding.

  • Reserved Seating for individuals with mobility challenges.
  • Audio-Visual Aids to assist those with hearing or vision impairments.

These amenities make the X60 an inclusive option for all travelers.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

1.

2.

Journey Experience

On a recent trip on Bus X60 from Abu Dhabi Bus Station to Liwa Mezaira’a Bus Station, travelers experienced a scenic journey through the city’s vibrant landscape. Departing from the bustling bus station, the route passed through Musaffah and Mohamed Bin Zayed City, showcasing modern and traditional Emirati culture. Key stops included Madinat Zayed, a hub for shopping and local experiences.

With comfortable seating and convenient amenities, Bus X60 proved to be an excellent option for commuters and tourists alike looking to explore Abu Dhabi’s diverse attractions.

Travel Tips for Bus X60

  • Plan Your Trip: Review the bus schedule to avoid peak hours and ensure timely departures.

  • Use a Hafilat Card: This payment method streamlines your journey and eliminates cash handling.
  • Monitor Real-Time Updates: Utilize the AD Mobility app for live schedule updates to avoid delays.
  • Travel During Off-Peak Hours: For a quieter ride, consider traveling outside of rush hours.

Bus X60 is an efficient and budget-friendly transportation option across Abu Dhabi, linking essential hubs and providing easy access to the broader region. Take a ride on Bus X60 to explore the unique features of Abu Dhabi while enjoying the convenience of regular service throughout the day. For a complete overview, refer to the full Abu Dhabi bus route!

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: November 10, 2025.
